items.content_html:
1991—2005
MAPPING TO 1903—1917
THE ORIGINAL STABLE FORM OF THE NEW HUMANITY. INITIATED JOINTLY BY THE ROYAL-BUREAUCRATIC GROUP AND THE WESTERN INTERVENTION FORCES, IT ATTEMPTED TO FREEZE CLASS CONTRADICTIONS THROUGH “SLIP DEATH,” “RULE,” AND “SEVERANCE OF WILL.” WITHIN THE ASIAN UNION, IT EXISTED AS AN “INTERDISCIPLINARY CORE RESEARCH GROUP,” WITH ESPIONAGE WARFARE AS ITS GUIDING PRINCIPLE.
2005—2010
MAPPING TO 1917—1923
DURING THE CIVIL WAR, THE NEW HUMANITY PROJECT WAS FORCIBLY INTEGRATED INTO THE MILITARY-POLITICAL MACHINE UNDER THE PRESSURE OF TOTAL WAR. BLOODLINES AND MIRACLES ENTERED THE SAME CENTRAL HUMAN RACE FOR THE FIRST TIME.
2010—2015
MAPPING TO 1924—1927
A SPLIT EMERGED WITHIN THE NEW HUMANITY PROJECT. ONE SIDE PRODUCED “MIRACLE PEOPLE”; THE ASIAN AND EUROPEAN SIDE ATTEMPTED TO PORTRAY THE “REVOLUTION” ITSELF AS A MIRACLE BUT OPPOSED THE SPLIT.
2015—2025
MAPPING TO 1927—1937
THE NEW HUMANITY PROJECT TEETERED ON THE BRINK OF COLLAPSE. THE ATOMIC BOMB, AS THE “ULTIMATE CARRIER FACT,” WAS CREATED, AND COLD COMPUTATION BEGAN TO TAKE SHAPE.
2025—2033
MAPPING TO 1937—1945
DURING THE WAR AGAINST AGGRESSION, THE COLD COMPUTATION KEY WAS LINKED TO GLOBAL NUCLEAR DETERRENCE, BECOMING THE EUROPEAN UNION’S DOOMSDAY SAFETY NET.
2033—2035
MAPPING TO 1945—1947
THE NEW HUMAN PROJECT COMPLETELY FAILED. THE “SOLUTIONS OFFICE” APPEARED AS A HYPOTHETICAL MIRACLE. SUBSEQUENTLY, THE SCIENTIFIC MOVEMENT UNFOLDED IN FULL FORCE, AND TIME WAS REDISCOVERED AND INSTITUTIONALIZED.
SPRING 2036
MAPPING TO 1948
THE MAIN STAGE OF THE STORY. POST-SCIENCE IS THE UNDERLYING OPERATING LOGIC OF THE WORLD; THE COLD COMPUTATION SYMBOL STILL EXISTS, BUT IT IS BEING SHAKEN BY THE STRATEGIC COUNTER-OFFENSIVE OF REVOLUTIONARY FORCES.
